qas.q: The informal resolution system includes all of the following means of interpersonal conflict resolutions, EXCEPT which one?
qas.a: Submitting a special request chit to request a Captain's Mast

qas.q: Which of the following is NOT a requirement for Commanding Officers to address in regards to Family Advocacy cases?
qas.a: Assign the Lautenburg Amendment to the service member

qas.q: Personal relationships are allowed between a Navy officer and an enlisted service member with which of the following affiliations?
qas.a: Marine Corps, Coast Guard, and Foreign Military

qas.q: "One-Time Access" for an individual to view information at a level above his authorized level, may be used during operational emergencies. What individual has the authority to grant this type of access?
When obtaining a temporary TOP SECRET clearance, which of the following is NOT a requirement?
qas.a: Authorization granted by Director, Department of the Navy Central Adjudication Facility

qas.q: When awarded, extra duty is NOT to exceed what total number of hours daily?
Procedures for missing ship's movement are contained what Uniform Code of Military Justice (UCMJ) article?
An appeal regarding a punishment received at Non-Judicial Punishment is required to be submitted within what maximum number of days?
What type of authority emanates from assignment to specific billets within the organization?
For a Commanding Officer of a unit command, which of the following situations is NOT a reason for mandatory Administrative Separation (ADSEP)?
qas.a: Individual is admitted to alcohol treatment for 3rd self-referral

qas.q: When preparing a budget, you should plan for what expense first?

Under the BRS sailors should receive a 1% contribution from their service component automatically, but are eligible for an additional matching contribution from the service component at hat maximum percentage?
Physical Fitness Assessment failures can effect a Sailor in the form of all of the following ways, EXCEPT which one?
Medical waivers are valid for what maximum number of Physical Fitness Assessment cycles?
What is the primary goal of the physical readiness program?
You suspect that a terrorist group is operating in your neighborhood. You should take which of the following actions?
The protection of their personnel and assets from the terrorist attacks is the ultimate responsibility of what member of the chain of command?
Aboard Navy installations, motor vehicle passengers are required to always wear which of the following items?
To report incidents of domestic or child abuse to Echelon 2 commands, what means should you use?
When questionable or unfavorable information arises for a command member with access to classified information, what program should commands utilize to report the incident(s) to DON CAF?
To ensure classified information is protected during a natural disaster or civil disturbance, what item should be developed?
What program has become the Navy's most effective tool(s) for detecting and identifying illegal drug use?
Procedures for missing ships' movement are contained what UCMJ article?
At captain's mast, what discipline cannot be awarded?
Any sailor who commits fraudulent activity should be charged under what article of the UCMJ?
The Navy sometimes assists financially irresponsible personnel by taking which of the following actions?
Which of the following items should you use for planning how to spend or manage your money?
One-on-One body composition assessments are authorized by what person, if any?
Which of the following is an objective of the Personal Excellence Program?
qas.a: To provide navy core value workshops for e-3 and below personnel

qas.q: Service members should perform strength training exercises what minimum amount of time per week?
Information that indicates ground, air, or Navy force levels or dispositions is what security classification?
Which of the following is NOT an indicator of potential violence by a work place employee?
Personnel may work on live electrical circuits or equipment under which of the following conditions?
qas.a: During emergency situations with the commanding officer's approval

qas.q: For work on a Navy installation, NAVOSH directives authorize joining what maximum number of 25-foot extension cords?
Repeated unwanted or uninvited request for dates could be considered which of the following behaviors?
Suicide prevention resources can be found at all of the following website, EXCEPT which one?
When you wear the new Navy working uniform, what type of boot is authorized?
qas.a: Black 9 inch tall steel toed leather boots

qas.q: On the service dress blue uniform, an Airman apprentice should wear what color group rate mark?
A Marine Corps captain wears what collar device?
In reference to rating badges on pea coats, which of the following statements, if any, is correct?
qas.a: Both men and women wear the men's size

qas.q: For female personnel in uniform, what is the maximum allowable length of hair?
On the service dress blue uniform, a Construction apprentice should wear what color of the group rate mark?
A gold oak leaf is worn on the uniform of which of the following officers?
An article of clothing purchased at the owner's expense and authorized for wear with the uniform is known as what part of a uniform?
The Navy neckerchief should be worn in what manner?
qas.a: Upper edge of the knot is even with the lowermost point of the collar opening

qas.q: Male personnel are authorized to maintain hair of what maximum length, in inches?
Ostracizing a service member who has reported a criminal offense is an example of what term?
Prohibited offensive conduct includes all of the following, EXCEPT which one?
Of the following statements, which one does NOT apply to Family Advocacy training requirements?
qas.a: All married personnel are required to undergo family counseling within one year of marriage

qas.q: A determination that an individual requires access to classified information in support of the performance of their duties is represented by what term?
Markings on CLASSIFIED documents should be placed in what position on the page?
qas.a: Centered at the top and bottom

qas.q: A summary court-martial can award confinement for what total number of days?
The use of unlawful force or violence with the intent of inflicting bodily harm is best described by what term?
When not specifically addressed by the treatment facility, what number of months are required for a command to monitor a member's aftercare plan?
The most logical time to use a credit card is in which of the following circumstances?
qas.a: When costly auto or home emergency repairs are needed

qas.q: A sailor must complete a periodic health assessment t what minimum interval?
Prior to an actual physical readiness test, member's official body composition assessment is required to be conducted within what a) maximum and b) minimum time periods?
An Assistant Command Fitness Leader should be assigned what ratio of students?
The five goals of Antiterrorism (AT) Force Protection are defending against, deterring, mitigating, recovering, and what other action?
Which of the following is NOT a good practice in the situation of an active shooter?
When operating electrical equipment, the term "one-hand rule" is best defined by which of the following phrases?
qas.a: Always energize or turn on electrical equipment with one hand free

qas.q: What approximate percent of Navy's deaths are contributed to non-hostile active duty suicides?
Participation in multiple campaigns or operations, multiple qualifications, and additional awards of a ribbon are indicated by what device?
With regard to grooming standards, what is the primary consideration?
qas.a: To contribute to a favorable military image

qas.q: Excluding a wedding ring set, what total number of additional rings may be worn while in uniform?
Which of the following rates requires a light blue rating insignia?
When warranted, while wearing the Physical Training Uniform, which of the following items are authorized optional components?
Appearance that does not blend with professional appearance in uniform is defined by what term?
Which of the following circumstances is NOT an example of a relationship that is contrary to good order and discipline?
qas.a: A relationship that results in perceived preferential treatment

qas.q: Establishing policy and ensuring the Family Advocacy Program meets command, sailor, and family member needs is the responsibility of what entity?
Navy unit reporting for fraternization incidents must be reported using what method?
Information, that if disclosed, could cause serious damage to national security, should be assigned what security classification?
Under what situation should a command NOT process a sailor for administrative separation (ADSEP) following a treatment failure?
A booklet used to record checking account transactions is known by what term?
Most electrical deaths could be prevented by taking which of the following actions?
Which of the following statements describes the umbrella component?
qas.a: A Palin, solid black, collapsible umbrella

qas.q: Ribbons should be worn a) what specified distance and b) what pocket?
Maximum authorized sideburn length is defined by what point relative to the ear?
When chipping or scrapping paint, you should wear what personal protective equipment?

Ensuring that proper measures are taken to keep machinery, spaces, and equipment operational, clean, and in a satisfactory, state of preservation is accomplished by which of the following types inspections conducted by a command representative?
